description: One main zipped compartment, with a laptop compartment that has a velcro closureTwo insert pockets, one organiser sleeve with a velcro closure and one inner zipped mesh pocketOne zipped pocket on the front with an asymmetric openingOne insert pocket on the lower part of the bag on the front and a buckle designTwo zipped pockets on both sidesOne padded haul loop for carrying at easeWide, adjustable padded handles and padded back for carrying at ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesMesh back for ventilationBranding on the frontWarranty: 6 months
